free_text: Measurement of the energy spectrum of prompt
neutrons from the fission of Pu239 by 0.215 MeV
3 MeV Van de Graaff of Geel lab.
Li-7(P,N)Be-7 reaction in a Li-F target of
4.5 micro-A, pulse width 1 ns. repetition rate
Canned in zirkalloy container with 0.2 mm wall
NE224 liquid scintillator,5 cm diameter 3.8 cm
length, with low noise photomultiplier RCA-8850.
Placed at 90 degree relative to proton beam and at
1.972 m from the axis of plutonium sample.
.Another similar detector used for monitoring of the
neutron flux placed at -35 degree relative to proton
beam and distance 3.20 m from the target
.Good agreement of fission neutron spectrum with
effects are present and were likely severely
.Maxwellian fit of the data gives E-bar=2.12+-0.01MeV
.Average of all mean fission neutron energies gives
